calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Discharged

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cohen of Law Office of Robert F. Cohen telephone number 415-593-6672 for Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.
Defendant Ryan Frederick telephone number 209-629-3978 in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RYAN FREDERICK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Mr. Frederick has known about the default judgment since 2007and thus this motion was not filed with the required reasonable diligence. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
